feed.title: HomeLab Docs1
feed.subtitle: A minimal, responsive and feature-rich Jekyll theme for technical writing.

entry.title: Auth0 Saml Cloudflare Zero Trust
entry.summary:
Auth0 SAML Cloudflare Zero trust
Sign up Auth0 (https://auth0.com/signup)
Create User
Create an Application → Applications > Applications
Give it a name eg. Cloudflare Access and select Single Page Web Application
Addon SAML2 Web App → Under this Application > Addons > Select SAML2 WEB APP
Select Settings Under Application Callback URL input https://.c...

entry.title: Hello HomeLab
entry.summary:
Welcome
Hello and welcome to my homelab docs site!
console.log() console.log() console.log()
name: 'push-remote'
on: push: branches: - master paths-ignore: - .gitignore - READ.md - LICENSE
sudo apt update && sudo apt update pwd pwd
Photos

entry.title: Testing
entry.summary:
Welcome
Hello and welcome to my homelab docs site!
console.log() console.log() console.log()
name: 'push-remote'
on: push: branches: - master paths-ignore: - .gitignore - READ.md - LICENSE
